title: client name in info breadcrumb contradicts docs
reason: by-design: 'no client names' claim is metrics-scoped in all docs; operator-assigned label, not a credential

title: client-controlled model string as unbounded metric attribute
reason: by-design: model id is the intended dashboard tag and routing key; double opt-in gating, loopback default, Sentry server-side truncation

title: traces_sample_rate doc slightly overstates the filtering mechanism
reason: style: consistent authorial shorthand used across main.rs comments; user-observable behavior correctly described

title: attach_stacktrace may embed build-time source paths (e.g. builder home dir/username) in error events
reason: by-design: events go to the operator's own DSN; informational, finder itself said no code change needed

title: capture_anyhow on run() errors sends serve/bind error chains to Sentry
reason: speculative: no current context string embeds secrets; hypothetical future-contributor concern, not a defect in this diff

title: Float equality comparison for traces_sample_rate change-detection
reason: by-design: exact-literal change detection for the restart-required warning, not numeric computation

title: New ko/ja/zh-cn content may sit in tension with AGENTS.md's "Docs are English-only" line
reason: by-design: site/ i18n (ko/ja/zh-cn locales) is pre-existing established architecture since #52; AGENTS.md line covers repo docs/code, not the Starlight i18n site — not a diff-introduced violation
